description: File Transfer Protocol — anonymous access, file exfiltration, credential brute-forcing, and recursive downloads.

tools.name: ftp (native client)
tools.description: Built-in FTP client for interactive file browsing and transfer.

commands.title: Anonymous login
commands.description: Connect and login as 'anonymous' with an empty password (or any email).

commands.title: Authenticated login
commands.description: Connect and login with username and password at the prompt.

commands.title: Anonymous login (one-liner)
commands.description: Scripted anonymous FTP login to list files and disconnect.

commands.title: Download a file (in session)
commands.description: Download a file from the FTP server (run inside ftp session).

commands.title: Upload a file (in session)
commands.description: Upload a local file to the FTP server (run inside ftp session).

commands.title: Binary mode transfer (in session)
commands.description: Switch to binary transfer mode for non-text files (run inside ftp session).

tools.name: wget — Recursive FTP Download
tools.description: Download entire FTP directory trees recursively.

commands.title: Anonymous recursive download
commands.description: Recursively download all files from an anonymous FTP server.

commands.title: Authenticated recursive download
commands.description: Recursively download all files with credentials.

commands.title: Download specific directory
commands.description: Recursively download a specific directory.

commands.title: Mirror entire FTP site
commands.description: Mirror the entire FTP site with timestamps.

tools.name: curl — FTP
tools.description: Versatile command-line tool for FTP file operations.

commands.title: List directory (anonymous)
commands.description: List the root directory of an anonymous FTP server.

commands.title: List directory (authenticated)
commands.description: List directory with credentials.

commands.title: Download a file
commands.description: Download a specific file from the FTP server.

commands.title: Upload a file
commands.description: Upload a local file to the FTP server.

tools.name: hydra — FTP Brute-force
tools.description: Fast network brute-forcer for FTP credentials.

commands.title: Single user with wordlist
commands.description: Brute-force FTP password for a single user.

commands.title: User list with wordlist
commands.description: Brute-force FTP with user and password lists.

commands.title: Single credential check
commands.description: Verify a single FTP credential pair.

commands.title: With verbose and threads
commands.description: Brute-force with verbose output and 8 threads.

commands.title: Check anonymous access
commands.description: Test if anonymous FTP access is allowed.

commands.title: Authenticate with credentials
commands.description: Validate FTP credentials.
